scenarios.text: Technician using a manual parts washer with unknown solvent. No lid on the tank and fumes are very strong.
Conveyor belt is rubbing against a seized idler roller, producing sparks near a pile of fine coal dust.
Employee working from a step ladder on the very top cap to reach a high valve.
Nitrogen cylinders stored in a small, unventilated closet without any signage.
Grinding wheel on a bench grinder is worn down to half its original size, and the tool rest is 2 inches away from the wheel.
Worker cutting concrete with a handheld saw. Thick white clouds of dust are blowing into the occupied workspace.
Hydraulic hose on a jumbo drill has a small pinhole leak spraying fluid under high pressure.
Extension cord has a missing ground pin on the plug end.
Pallet of batteries is leaking clear liquid onto the floor in the warehouse.
Personnel lift is missing its annual inspection sticker and the safety gate is tied open with wire.
Heavy rain has caused a small portion of the excavation wall to slough off onto the floor of the trench.
Lifting chain has a deep gouge in one of the links near the hook.
Employee is using compressed air at 90 psi to blow dust off their clothes.
Safety shower is blocked by several empty 55-gallon drums.
Maintenance shop is very noisy, requiring shouting to be heard from 2 feet away. No hearing protection is visible.
Forklift driver is looking at their phone while driving through a high-pedestrian area.
Employees are working outside in 100-degree heat without a designated rest area or water available.
Mezzanine level is stacked with heavy parts but has no load rating sign posted.
Something seems risky in the crusher area.
Contractor is performing welding on a fuel tank that was recently drained but not purged or tested.
